headline: Elon Musk's Robotaxi Plans Take Shape With Dallas, Houston Rollout, But Tesla Is Still Far Behind Waymo
summary: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) recently ramped up its Robotaxi operations in Texas, providing unsupervised Robotaxi rides in Dallas and Houston, while it was already providing rides in Austin. While the ramp-up in Cybercab production could provide another boost in its Robotaxi exploits, Tesla remains far behind its rival Alphabet Inc.‘s (NASDAQ:GOOGL) (NASDAQ:GOOG) Waymo. Tesla Vs Waymo On Thursday, Electrek reported that Tesla had increased the size of its unsupervised Robotaxi fleet to 25 across the
